name: firebase-smart-on-fhir
description: Firestore rules + AI proxy Cloud Functions for MediPrisma. This root package holds the Firestore security-rules test suite; the Cloud Functions live in functions/ with their own package.json.

scripts.test:functions: QUOTA_DAILY_LIMIT=3 QUOTA_ANON_LIMIT=2 QUOTA_DAILY_LIMIT_PERPLEXITY=2 QUOTA_DAILY_LIMIT_WHISPER=2 firebase emulators:exec --only firestore --project demo-mediprisma "node functions/node_modules/jest/bin/jest.js -c jest.functions.config.cjs"
scripts.test:e2e:app: firebase emulators:exec --only auth,firestore --project demo-mediprisma "npm --prefix '../medical-note-smart-on-fhir' run test:e2e:emulated"
scripts.test: npm run test:rules && npm run test:functions
